syntax_12283.creator: Aabsss
syntax_12283.title: Is Terminated
syntax_12283.description:
Returns true if the http client has been closed/shutdown.
Required Java 21+

en:
Returns true if the http client has been closed/shutdown.
Required Java 21+

syntax_12284.creator: Aabsss
syntax_12284.title: Close Http Client
syntax_12284.description:
Closes/shutdowns an http client
Required Java 21+

en:
Closes/shutdowns an http client
Required Java 21+

syntax_11686.creator: Aabsss
syntax_11686.title: Http Server Lifecycle
syntax_11686.syntax_pattern:
start [http[ server]] %httpservers%
(stop|shut[ ]down) [http[ server]] %httpservers% [with delay %integer%]
close http[ ]exchange %httpexchanges%

en: Stops/starts a http server.

syntax_12285.creator: Aabsss
syntax_12285.title: HTTP Parameter by Key
syntax_12285.description: Gets a parameter by it's key.

en: Gets a parameter by it's key.

syntax_12286.creator: Aabsss
syntax_12286.title: HTTP Client Builder
syntax_12286.entries: [{"name": "timeout", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "null"}, {"name": "follow redirects", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "null"}, {"name": "priority", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "null"}, {"name": "version", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false, "defaultValue": "null"}, {"name": "executor", "isRequired": false, "isSection": true, "defaultValue": "null"}]

en: Builds a HTTP client.

syntax_12287.creator: Aabsss
syntax_12287.title: Send Websocket Builder
syntax_12287.description:
Creates a new websocket.
# Note:
Use WebsocketOpenEvent in order to do actions when opened.
syntax_12287.syntax_pattern: (register|make|send) [a] [new] websocket request with [ur(l|i)] %string% and store it in %object%

en:
Creates a new websocket.
# Note:
Use WebsocketOpenEvent in order to do actions when opened.

Will be stored in the data folder.

syntax_11685.creator: Aabsss
syntax_11685.title: Exchange Respond
syntax_11685.description: Sends a response to the endpoint/context.
syntax_11685.syntax_pattern:
respond with [response] code %integer% [and message %object%] [using %httpexchange%]
(send|post) [response] code %integer% [and message %object%] [using %httpexchange%]

en: Sends a response to the endpoint/context.
Removes a server http endpoint/context.
Aborts a websocket.
Requests a websocket.

syntax_11690.creator: Aabsss
syntax_11690.title: Websocket Send Status
syntax_11690.syntax_pattern:
(send|post) close with status code %integer% and reason %string% (with|by|using) [websocket] %websockets%
(send|post) [last] binary message %string% (with|by|using) [websocket] %websockets%
(send|post) ping message %string% (with|by|using) [websocket] %websockets%
(send|post) pong message %string% (with|by|using) [websocket] %websockets%
(send|post) [last] (text|message) %string% (with|by|using) [websocket] %websockets%

en: Sends a websocket status.

(put|add) [[key] %string% [and]] [value] %object% in %jsonobjects/jsonarrays%

syntax_11805.creator: Aabsss
syntax_11805.title: Send Http Request
syntax_11805.description:
Sends an, optionally async, http request.
# Note:
If you are sending an async request, you will have to use the section in order to get the response on time.
syntax_11805.syntax_pattern:
(send|post) [[a]sync[hronous]] [http] request using [[client] %httpclient% and] [request] %httprequest%
(send|post) [http] request using [[client] %httpclient% and] [request] %httprequest% [a]synchronously

en:
Sends an, optionally async, http request.
# Note:
If you are sending an async request, you will have to use the section in order to get the response on time.

en: Returns a new http server with an optional specified port.
